name: Cloudhorn
concept: a gentle sky-goat whose soft cloud fleece grows into the mantle of a mountain-weather guardian
stageDescriptions: a tiny round lamb with short legs, two golden horn buds, a puffball cloud tail, and a curious friendly face
a nimble young goat with small curled golden horns, thicker cloud fleece around its neck, and the same friendly face
a sturdy adolescent mountain goat with swept spiral horns, a billowing cloud mane, and one small pale-blue lightning marking on its shoulder
a majestic adult sky guardian goat with large elegant spiral horns, a flowing cloud mantle, sturdy quadruped proportions, and the same pale-blue lightning marking
habitat: sunlit highland meadows above a sea of clouds
